_meta.note: Machine-seeded Wave 13-14. Real translated strings in native script. Human review required before ratification.

speakFriend.title: Tautala uo, ona ulufale.
speakFriend.description: Ua fausia Liana Banyan e tatala mo gagana uma. O gagana tatala taitasi e iai le tasi o le faafoi mea.
speakFriend.provisionalNotice: O le lisi o gagana ma aano o Marks e faataunuuina. Marks ni faailoga o auai, e le o saea.
speakFriend.bountyDescription: Faafoi Liana Banyan i le {{language}}. Maua {{marks}} Marks.
speakFriend.scopeNavigation: Faailoga faatonu ma fesilafai mea faasese
speakFriend.scopeWildfire: Wildfire Beacon Run: Saili se galuega
speakFriend.baseLanguage: Gagana faavae -- e leai se mea manaomia.
speakFriend.speakFounderTitle: Le Leo o le Faavae: Aisea nei Upu
speakFriend.speakFounderDesc: O upu uma i luga o le faiga ua faaigoa i se mafuaaga. O le amataga o igoa 26 sili ona taua.
speakFriend.howBountiesWork: Pe Faafefea Ona Galue Mea Faafoi
speakFriend.step1Body: Tatala le Mea Faafoi mai le fao Help Wanted.
speakFriend.step2Body: Faafoi ni faamatalaga uma e manaomia. Auina atu e ala i le Bounty Poster.
speakFriend.step3Body: Ina ua mauaina, e maua Marks ma faamauina i le IP Ledger.
speakFriend.subtitle: "Fai e uo, e ulufale."

languageSwitcher.tip: Faaaoga upu faasee o gagana eseese i le Faitotoa o Durin e tatala ai ni aafiaga ese!
